## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting. -->

## Problem or Use Case

<!-- Describe the problem or use case that this feature would address. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your proposed solution for the feature. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->

## Implementation Suggestions

<!-- Optional: Provide implementation suggestions or ideas -->
- **Component**: [e.g., Frontend, Backend, Model]

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues using #issue-number -->

## Success Criteria

<!-- Define what would need to be true for this feature to be considered complete -->
- [ ] Feature works as described
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated
